## nsc auth exchange-oidc-token

Generate a Namespace Cloud token from a OIDC token.

```
nsc auth exchange-oidc-token [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help               help for exchange-oidc-token
      --tenant_id string   What tenant to authenticate.
      --token string       The OIDC token to use for authentication.
```
